titleStmt.title: SII 9.593: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 593. (A.R. No. 302 of 1925.) ON A SLAB PLANTED NEAR THE TANK-BUND OF CHIKKAKERIYAGINAHALLI, KUDLIGI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1461, Vikāri, Bhādrapada, śu. 12, corresponding to A.D. 1539 August 26, Tuesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Achyutarāya. It records the construction of the tank Hiriya-Lakkasamudra by Bayakāṟa Rāmappayya in the name of his mother Hiriya-Lakkarasamma. It states that Rāmaya, who was the son of Pedda-Timmaya and Lakkāmbikā, and grandson of Rāma-mantri and Telagamāmbā and great grandson of Bhāvaya-mantri, who was the son of Śiṅgaya, was the chief of Koṇḍavīḍu division. He constructed the agrahāras, Tīmmāpura, Chinna-Timmāpura and Maṅgimāvinahaḷḷi, and constructing a number of temples in Pedda-Timmāpura, set up the gods Gōpinātha, Bāchēśvara, Kṛishṇēśa, Ammēśa, Mallikārjuna, Vīrabhadra and Viśvanātha. He made a grant of the village Hoḷagundi for the service of these gods. Having constructed Achyutammāpura after the name of his daughter, Achyutamma, he set up the god Kṛishṇa in a temple of his own construction there; he also caused the construction of the tanks, Achyutammasamudra, Bāchasamudra, Rāmasamudra, Akkasamudra, Kāmasamudra, Ammasamudra, Vīrasamudra, Achyutēndrasamudra, Veṅkatēndrasamudra, Pina-Lakkasamudra, Chinna-Tippasamudra, Achutammāsamudra, Pedda-Lakkasamudra, Liṅgālayataṭāka, Venkaṭayyataṭāka, Peda-Timmasamudra and China-Bāchasamudra; thus he constructed on the whole sixteen tanks. He is also stated to have written a work on music. His uncles were Timma-mantrī, Sūrīndra, Bhāskara-Chamūpati and Bhāvaya, all holding high offices under the king. The latter portion describing his charities is written in Sanskrit language.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁgaḷu
1461 neya vikārisaṁvatsarada bhādrapada śu 12 yalu śrī
matu bayakāṟa rāmappayyanavaru taṁma tāyi hiriyalakha
rasaṁmage puṇyavāgebēkeṁdu Āvara hesarilli kaṭṭisida hiriya
lakhasamudrada keṟe . śrī śrī
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē .śaurērnābhisarōruhādvidhirabhūttasmādvasiṣṭastataḥ śaktistasya sutaḥ parā
śaramunistadvaṁśabhūḥ śiṁgayaḥ . tasmādbhāvayamaṁtryatassamabhavachrīrāmamaṁ
trī kṛtī tasyāsītsahadharmiṇī telugamā gaṁgēva dugdhāṁbadhē[ḥ .*] rāmāṁbudhi
stalugamāṁbaranimnagāyāṁ paṁcāmaradrumanibhān sumanōvadānyānṛ .
putrānasūta pedatiṁmayatiṁmamaṁtrisūrīṁdrabhāskaracamūpatibhāvayēṁ
drān . prakhyātō bhuvi bācayaprabhumaṇistēṣu pradhānāgraṇīrlabdhaivācyuta
dēvarāyadayayā śrīkoṁḍavīṭikṣitiṁ . tatrākalpitagōpināthanagarē śrīgōpinā
thābhidaṁ dēvaṁ tatra nidhāya sarvamaśiṣatsēnāṁdhradēśasthalīṁ . tasyāgrajanmā pedatiṁ
ṁmayēṁdrō lakkāṁbikā tasya bhabhūva patnī . tayōstapasyāparipākamūrtirvi
rājatē rāmayamaṁtrivaryaḥ . prakhyātācyutadēvarāyanṛpatēssaṁprāptamu
ktāmaṇichatrādyānaghakoṁḍavīṭinagarīdurgādhipatyōjvalaḥ . rāmāmātyaśi
khāmaṇiḥ parivahatyāptāṁdhradēśasthalē dēvabrāhmaṇamaṁḍalāya bahuḷānapya
graharān dadau . śākābdēvanikārtikēyavadanāṁbhōdhīṁdusaṁkhyānvitē varṣē
cāpi vikārināmani nabhōmāsē sa rāmaprabhu .rgrāmaṁ kṣullakakīḍahaḷḷisahi
taṁ labdhvācyutakṣmādhipāchrītiṁmāpuramagrahāramakarōt khyātyōṁṭivūrā
bhidhaṁ . tiṁmāpurāgrahārasya grāmagrāsatayā kṛtaṁ . ciṁnatiṁmāpuramiti
pratināmasamāśritaṁ . maṁgimāvinahaḷyākhyaṁ grāmaṁ sasyōpaśōbhitaṁ .
rāmayāmātyavaryōyamagrahāramathākarōt . pedatiṁmāpurē kṛtvā dēvā
gārāṇyanēkaśaḥ . tēṣu kramātpratiṣṭhāpya gōpīnāthābhidhaṁ hariṁ . bācēśvaraṁ
ca kṛṣṇēśamammēśaṁ mallikārjunaṁ . viśvanāthaṁ ca dēvēśaṁ vīrabhadraṁ jagatpati [ṁ .]
hoḷagoṁdimahāgrāmaṁ taṭākārāmaśōbhitaṁ . nityapūjākṛtē tē
bhyaḥ prādādācaṁdratārakaṁ . vāggēyakāravaryōsau rāmayāmātyaśēkharaḥ .
Acyutaṁmābhidhānāyā kumāryāḥ svasya nāmataḥ . Acyutaṁmāpuramiti
pratināmasamāśritaṁ . hūlikuṁṭābhidaṁ grāmamagrahāramathākarōt .
Acyutaṁmāpuragrāmē dēvāgāraṁ vidhāya ca . tatra kṛṣṇaṁ pratiṣṭhāpya tasyāḥ
puṇyāya bhūyasē . Anēkavṛkṣasaṁyuktamārāmaṁ sumanōharaṁ . Acyu
taṁmasamudrākhyaṁ taṭākamakarōtsudhīḥ . pedatiṁmāpuragrāmē pinatiṁmāpu
rēpi ca . Acyutaṁmāpurē caiva rāmayāmātyaśēkharaḥ . ramyaṁ bācasamudraṁ ca tathā
rāmasamudrakaṁ . khyātamakkasamudraṁ ca kāntaṁ kāmasamudrakaṁ . kṛdyamaṁ
masamudraṁ ca varaṁ vīrasamudrakaṁ . Acutēṁdrasamudraṁ ca vēṁkaṭēṁdrasa
mudrakaṁ . pinalakkasamudraṁ ca cinnatippasamudrakaṁ . Acataṁmāsamudraṁ ca pe
dalakkasamudrakaṁ . liṁgālayataṭākaṁ ca veṁkaṭayyataṭākakaṁ . pedatiṁmasamu
draṁ ca cinabācasamudrakaṁ . taṭākān vividhāṁścakrē vikhyātāniti ṣōḍaśa . Āpuri
tadigaṁtāni vanānyupavanāni ca . Āmnayaghōṣamukharānayamācaṁdratāra
kaṁ . sthāpayāmāse viprēṁdrān rāmayāmātyaśēkharaḥ . dānapālanayō
rmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānātsārgamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ
[padaṁ .]
Digital edition of SII 9.593 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
